assertions.description: INCORRECT: The RussianClone has the same 3 POT components (SUSTAIN1, TONE1, VOLUME1) with lib_id='POT' as the BasicClone. One POT is misclassified as 'transformer' (component_types.transformer=1) and another as 'resistor', producing the same wrong counts: resistor=24 (should be 23), switch=2 (should be 4), transformer=1 (should be 0). There are no transformers in this guitar pedal design.
